title: Bring comments from one board to another board
excerpt: I am looking at a way to copy comments on one board (team board) to a manager board.  Right now, my managers need to read all the comments and then summarize onto a manager board.

posts.author: katlaj (Kirstin Stenlund)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking at a way to copy comments on one board (team board) to a manager board. Right now, my managers need to read all the comments and then summarize onto a manager board.

posts.author: garfield-labs (Snir Alon)
posts.cookedHtml: Try to use Same Item Multiple Boards
